name: Professor Pritam Singh
title: Emeritus Professor of Economics
bio: Professor Pritam Singh is Emeritus Professor at Oxford Brookes Business School with extensive research in development, sustainability, and political economy focusing on India and Punjab. He has led research on sustainability implications of spatial shifts in global capitalism and Indian capitalism with emphasis on decentralisation and human rights.

education.DPhil: University of Oxford (Oriel College), awarded Edward Boyle/Charles Wallace Scholarship
education.MPhil: Jawaharlal Nehru University, New Delhi, India
education.MA_BA: MA & BA Hons School in Economics, Panjab University, Chandigarh, India

research_interests: Sustainability and Spatial Shift in Global Economy
